reporting.title: Reporting
reporting.description: Run exports from the same data your workspace uses. Pick a frequency, period, and report; output formats (PDF, Excel, HTML, XML, JSON, and more) depend on the report and your permissions. Connections to your API should use HTTPS in production.
reporting.reporting_sub: The catalog and live figures come from the same server calculations as your exports: journal entries, chart of accounts, and analytic data for the company. Numbers below are not samples—they are pulled for the engine fiscal year shown. Filenames also encode your selected period.
reporting.no_journal: no posted journal in this year yet
reporting.accounts_in_scope: {{count}} account(s) in chart scope for this year.
reporting.server_hint: (server uses fiscal year; filename includes your period label: {{period}})
reporting.live_figures_title: Live figures from your system (fiscal year {{year}})
reporting.no_company_warn: No company is selected. Choose a company in the app so the reporting API can read your data.
reporting.no_perms_warn: You do not have permission to view any catalog reports, or the catalog is empty.
reporting.help_tls_hint: Optional help opens in a new tab only for the URL you configure in the build.
reporting.loading_catalog: Loading report catalog from the system...
reporting.select_company_error: Select a company in the workspace before generating reports.
reporting.choose_report_error: Choose a report from the list.
reporting.no_perms_error: You do not have permission for this report and format.
reporting.json_success: JSON export downloaded. Filename includes the selected period and fiscal year.
reporting.download_started: Download started. Filename encodes the selected period.

reports.no_data: No data available for this period.
reports.no_company: Please select a company in the workspace to run financial reports.

cash_flow.title: Cash Flow Statement
cash_flow.subtitle: Fiscal year {{year}} · Indirect method
cash_flow.methodology_body: Operating cash flow uses the fiscal-year trial balance (classes 7−6, 68, 49/59, working capital on 3 and 41–45 vs the prior year). Investing uses year-over-year movement on class 2 (excluding 28–29 amortization/impairment) with per-account detail. Financing proxies changes on loans (16) and capital (10–11). Opening/closing cash are cumulative signed balances of all class-5 accounts from the journal (through each year-end), so you can reconcile modeled flow to actual cash accounts.
cash_flow.investing_financing_note: Per-account lines are the largest movers; section totals include all accounts in that scope. Reconciliation variance compares cumulative class-5 movement to the modeled total.

dashboard.quick_income_desc: Revenue, expenses, and net result for the year.

trial_balance.empty: No accounts with balances found for this period.

tax_compliance.title: Tax & compliance
tax_compliance.subtitle: Structured like major OHADA suites: accounting compliance first (books and notes), then national tax estimates from your ledger, then regulatory filings and electronic exports. Compare with ECOHADA-style liasse fiscale, ECF, and DGI channels.
tax_compliance.no_company: Select a company in the workspace to run tax figures from your posted journal.
tax_compliance.no_perm_calc: You need balance sheet read permission to compute tax from the trial balance.
tax_compliance.error_calculate: Tax calculation failed. Check permissions and company context.
tax_compliance.engine_cta: Amounts are derived from your trial balance (classes 6–7) for the selected year — the same engine as production reports.
tax_compliance.zone_books_desc: Statutory financial statements and notes used as the base for tax and for external reporting.
tax_compliance.c1: Reconcile the trial balance and key class-1–7 accounts for the year.
tax_compliance.c2: Review income statement and balance sheet before using tax results.
tax_compliance.c3: File declarations and XML from the ECF area when values are final.
tax_compliance.zone_engine_desc: IS, TVA (simplified from revenue), and IMF are estimated from your ledger. For binding filings use official DGI forms and the ECF module.
tax_compliance.zone_decl_desc: Tax packages, FEC, representative XML, and e-billing test hooks — the regulatory export side of compliance.
tax_compliance.decl_bullets: CIT, VAT, IRPP calculations saved as declarations; FEC file; XML download; DGI submit (stub) — align with DGI/COBAC process in your jurisdiction.
tax_compliance.legal: Indicative calculation: verify against current Loi de Finances, DGI instruction, and your adviser. SYSCOHADA and OHADA Acte Uniforme govern accounting presentation; national law governs tax. Third-party product names (ECOHADA, Kokamba, Tauraco, etc.) are for functional comparison only.
tax_compliance.build_declaration_desc: Build a new tax declaration with SYSCOHADA controls and WORM sealing.
tax_compliance.prep_desc: Data checks, mapping, and disclosures prior to controls.
tax_compliance.preview_desc: Review calculated values and XML export.
tax_compliance.evidence_desc: Attach supporting documents to this filing.
tax_compliance.controls_desc: SYSCOHADA consistency checks (Balance sheet, P&L, Mapping).
tax_compliance.pack_desc: Generate full bundle (XML, FEC, PDF, Notes), lock period, and WORM seal.
tax_compliance.submit_desc: Transmit to DGI (stub) and archive response.

reporting_messages.no_pdf_fallback_excel: Trial balance has no PDF in this app; the file is Excel (.xlsx).
reporting_messages.full_statements_bs_pdf: This catalog line refers to a full set of statements. The download is the balance sheet (PDF) for the fiscal year. For income and cash flow, also run the “Income statement” and “Cash flow” catalog lines.
reporting_messages.full_statements_bs_xml: Full statements: this download is the balance sheet (XML) for the fiscal year. Use income statement and cash flow catalog lines for the other primary statements.
reporting_messages.full_statements_bs_html: Full statements: this download is the balance sheet (HTML) for the fiscal year. Use income statement and cash flow catalog lines for the other primary statements.
reporting_messages.json_handoff_excel: JSON handoff: use the “JSON manifest (IT / core)” button, or this Excel is the balance sheet (fiscal).
reporting_messages.full_statements_bs_excel: Full statements: this file is the balance sheet; use other catalog lines for income and cash flow.
reporting_messages.no_pdf_match_fallback_bs: No direct PDF match for this report title. The balance sheet (PDF) for the selected fiscal year is provided instead. Prefer titles that name trial balance, income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, or financial statements for an exact engine match.
reporting_messages.no_csv_fallback_html: No dedicated CSV in this app; HTML export is used for a tabular view to copy or import.
reporting_messages.pdf_error_fallback: Server returned an error instead of a PDF.
reporting_messages.pdf_invalid_error: The response is not a valid PDF file. Check export permissions or try again.
